emails.subject: FW: California
emails.body: FW: California Jeff, am forwarding this to you for your info and possible further handling. Ken is on vacation, but I will send this to him. Thanks. Rosie To: Lay, Kenneth

emails.subject: FW: California
emails.body: FW: California Jeff, am forwarding this to you for your info and possible further handling. Ken is on vacation, but I will send this to him. Thanks. Rosie To: Lay, Kenneth

emails.subject: Re: FW: California
emails.body: Re: FW: California Thanks very much Rosalee. Karen: Do you have a copy of the Dow Jones article? I'd like to email the piece to Brulte, if you don' t have any objections. Best, Jeff Rosalee Fleming/ENRON@enronXgate 05/31/2001 06:07 PM

emails.subject: Re: FW: California
emails.body: Re: FW: California Thanks very much Rosalee. Karen: Do you have a copy of the Dow Jones article? I'd like to email the piece to Brulte, if you don' t have any objections. Best, Jeff Rosalee Fleming/ENRON@enronXgate 05/31/2001 06:07 PM

emails.subject: Re: FW: California
emails.body: Re: FW: California I'll forward the piece to Brulte via email and offer to meet with him when I'm in Sacramento on Monday, or have a phone call with him before Monday to discuss the proposal further if he would like. Best, Jeff Rosalee Fleming/ENRON@enronXgate 05/31/2001 06:07 PM
